title: Apology Letter
text:
## Apology Letter

Dear {person},

I am deeply sorry for {verb ending in -ing} your {object} during the {adjective} party.

It was wrong to {verb} near the {place} and even worse to blame your {animal}.

I should not have {past-tense verb} your favorite {object} or told everyone about the {adjective} incident.

**To make amends** I will {verb} publicly, replace the {object}, and never again {verb} without permission.

Please forgive me.

Sincerely,
{person}, a reformed {adjective} person.
